g.title: shadow_catalog
g.text: ShadowCatalog — LRU + generation invalidation + SchemaEvent emission (plans/shadow.md)

g.title: legend
g.text: libpq query / SchemaEvent flow (solid = forward path)
CH Native DDL (off hot path, separate TCP)
first sight of oid → CREATE TABLE (post-DROP re-create, seed_from_source)
refetched shape ≠ prev_known: ADD/DROP/RENAME COLUMN, type widen (rejected for now)
emit_dropped (pg_class heap_delete) or sweep_dropped poll → DROP TABLE

one DDL → one bump → every cache entry stale on next access. Coarse-fire over-invalidates (hint-bit / autovac noise count) but never under-invalidates — schema correctness is the floor, refetch cost the negotiable.
